news.headline: Marathon Digital CEO Thiel advises saving in Bitcoin monthly for long-term as it appreciates 29-50% annually over 14 years.
news.summary: Fred Thiel, the CEO of Marathon Digital Holdings, a company listed on the NASDAQ with the symbol MARA, recently discussed the benefits of consistently saving in Bitcoin. Thiel believes that Bitcoin, which is denoted by the symbol BTC, is a wise long-term investment due to its increasing acceptance in traditional financial markets. According to Thiel, Bitcoin has shown remarkable stability over the past 14 years, with only three instances of annual declines, one of which occurred during the global market crisis caused by the COVID-19 pandemic. He stated that, on average, Bitcoin has seen yearly appreciation ranging between 29% and 50%. Thiel's insights were shared during an interview on Fox Business. For more details, the full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: $14B bid by Nippon Steel for U.S. Steel faces rejection by Biden, prompting potential legal and diplomatic issues.
news.summary: Nippon Steel's proposed $14 billion acquisition of the steelmaking company is likely to be blocked by President Biden. If rejected, potential legal battles and international tensions may arise as a result.

news.headline: Carolinas AGC announces 2025 Board with Chair Ty Edmondson, Lynn Hansen as Chair Elect, and Marty Moser as Treasurer.
news.summary: In Charlotte, North Carolina, on January 3, 2025, Carolinas AGC (CAGC) revealed its newly appointed 2025 Board of Directors. The CAGC Board comprises the following key members: Ty Edmondson from T. A. Loving Company serving as Chair, Lynn Hansen from Crowder Constructors Inc. as Chair Elect, and Marty Moser holding the position of Treasurer.

news.headline: JP Morgan's Misra warns of risk assets reacting to changing interest rates.
Tarkett provides total number of voting rights and shares as of December 31, 2024 in Paris, France.
news.summary: As of December 31st, 2024, Tarkett's share capital in Paris, France, comprised a total of voting rights and shares. This information provides insight into the company's ownership structure and potential influence of shareholders in decision-making processes.

news.headline: Viper Partners focuses on growing vascular surgery practices nationwide through strategic mergers and acquisitions.
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, in Palm Beach, Florida, Viper Partners, a top healthcare investment banking firm, declared its dedication to enhancing vascular surgery practices across the country. The company aims to boost growth and progress through strategic mergers and acquisitions, reinforcing its position in the industry.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures increase as Nasdaq tests 50-day moving average in 2025. Tesla and Apple lead losses, some stocks show buy signals.
news.summary: In the beginning of 2025, the Nasdaq experienced volatility as it tested its 50-day moving average. Key players like Tesla and Apple saw declines, contributing to the market's uncertain state. Despite this, some stocks showed signals for potential buying opportunities. Dow Jones futures are on the rise, indicating a possible shift in market sentiment. The overall market rally is approaching a critical point following the significant losses from Tesla and Apple. This update signifies the dynamic nature of the current stock market climate.

news.headline: Stay updated on key climate developments this year to better understand the state of our planet.
Fairfax Financial Holdings Limited announces Brian Young as President of Fairfax Insurance Group, with Andrew Barnard becoming Chairman as of Jan. 1, 2025.
news.summary: Fairfax Financial Holdings Limited has disclosed that Brian Young took on the role of President of Fairfax Insurance Group starting from January 1, 2025. Andrew Barnard, who served as President since 2011, is now the Chairman of Fairfax Insurance Group. Fairfax is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the tickers TSX: FFH and FFH.U.

news.headline: CME Group achieved record annual ADV of 26.5 million contracts in 2024, driven by growth across all six asset classes. Record ADV in interest rate, agri, FX, and metals products, and record Q4 ADV for U.S. Treasury and cryptocurrency complexes.
news.summary: In the year 2024, there were record high average daily volumes (ADV) in various trading categories, including interest rate, agricultural, foreign exchange, and metals products. The ADV for U.S. Treasury and SOFR complexes also reached all-time highs during this period. Notably, there was a record-breaking ADV achieved outside of the United States. In the fourth quarter of the same year, there was a significant increase in ADV for U.S. Treasury and cryptocurrency complexes. This marked a successful year for trading activities in these sectors, with impressive figures indicating a prosperous market performance.

news.headline: Europe power system simulation software market expected to reach $900.6 million by 2033, growing at CAGR of 7.05% from $417.5 million in 2023 - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: In Dublin, a report titled "Europe Power System Simulation Software Market: Focus on Application, Product, and Country - Analysis and Forecast, 2023-2033" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market for power system simulation software in Europe is anticipated to expand significantly, with projections indicating an increase from $417.5 million in 2023 to $900.6 million by 2033. This growth represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.05% throughout the forecast period of 2023-2033. The surge in demand for reliable energy management solutions is a key driver across various sectors such as manufacturing.

news.headline: Fairfax Financial declares $15.00 dividend per share payable on Jan 23, 2025, to shareholders of record on Jan 16.
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, Fairfax Financial Holdings Limited made a public declaration that it will be issuing a dividend of US$15.00 per share on its multiple voting and subordinate voting shares. Investors recorded as shareholders on January 16, 2025, will receive the payout on January 23, 2025. For those who are not Canadian residents, Canadian withholding tax regulations will be enforced on the dividend payments. Fairfax's stocks are traded on the Toronto Stock Exchange with the symbols TSX: FFH and FFH.U.

news.headline: Small business owners want Congress to focus on taxes, spending, and immigration in 2025 according to NWYC survey.
news.summary: In Dallas on January 3, 2025, small business owners are eager for the new Congress to take action in the coming year. According to a recent survey conducted by National Write Your Congressman (NWYC), a group advocating for small business interests, these entrepreneurs are looking for legislative changes. The survey gathered input from a significant number of small business owners across the nation, showcasing their desire for policies that support their ventures.

news.headline: Europe Maritime Cybersecurity Market set to reach $3.49 billion by 2033, growing at CAGR of 13.64% as per the latest report.
news.summary: A report focusing on the Europe Maritime Cybersecurity Market has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market is estimated to grow significantly, reaching $3.49 billion by 2033 from $972.3 million in 2023, with a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 13.64% during the forecast period of 2023-2033. The emphasis is on safeguarding digital assets and networks within the maritime sector from online threats.

news.headline: PBoC vows to cut RRR and interest rates at an appropriate time.
Global Automotive Wires & Cables Market valued at $36.02 billion in 2023, with 5.3% CAGR growth expected from 2025-2030. Asia-Pacific dominates the industry.
news.summary: A report titled "Automotive Wires & Cables Market: Market Size, Trends, Opportunities and Forecast by Application, Vehicle Type, Propulsion Type, Region, By Country: 2020-2030" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The global Automotive Wires & Cables Market was valued at USD 36.02 billion in 2023, with a projected growth at a CAGR of 5.3% from 2025 to 2030. The market is experiencing steady growth due to the rising complexity in the automotive industry.

news.headline: CenterPoint Energy prepares for cold snap in 2025 across Texas, Louisiana, Mississippi, Indiana, and Ohio. Teams ready for storms and severe weather with PRNewswire report on Jan 3, 2025.
news.summary: Teams in Texas, Louisiana, and Mississippi are gearing up for imminent storms and severe weather this weekend, alongside bracing for a significant cold front next week. Meanwhile, teams in Indiana and Ohio are preparing for anticipated ice and snowstorms during the upcoming week. As of Jan. 3, 2025, CenterPoint Energy remains vigilant in monitoring the situation as these regions face potential weather challenges.

news.headline: Dollar's strength in 2024 driven by Trump policies, up 6.73% YTD. Anticipated to rise further in 2025 - JPMorgan predicts new highs.
news.summary: The U.S. Dollar has seen a significant surge in strength in 2024, trading at levels not seen in 22 years. The Dollar index is up 6.73% year-to-date, ranging from 100.1570 to 108.5410 per unit. This bullish momentum is expected to continue into the new year, driven by President-elect Donald Trump’s proposed tax cuts and tariff hikes. The Federal Reserve's recent 25 basis point cut and the anticipation of only two cuts in 2025 further bolster the Dollar's position. JPMorgan Research predicts the Dollar will continue to appreciate, potentially reaching new highs, due to global growth prospects favoring the U.S. and factors like widening economic disparities and Fed rate revisions. Meera Chandan from JPMorgan notes that while these assessments may change as Trump's policies unfold, the current conditions strongly support a stronger Dollar.

news.headline: Herbalife (NYSE: HLF) to announce Q4 and full-year 2024 results on February 19. Webcast scheduled at 5:30pm ET.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Herbalife Ltd. (NYSE: HLF) will announce its Q4 and full-year 2024 financial results on February 19, 2025, after the NYSE trading session. A live audio webcast and conference call led by Herbalife’s senior management team will take place on the same day at 5:30 p.m. ET (2:30 p.m. PT) to review the financial outcomes. The webcast will be accessible via the provided link.

news.headline: Is 2022 the year Laos finally emerges as a top tourist destination with new hotels, roads, and trains?
news.summary: Laos, a country in Southeast Asia, has not been as popular for tourism as its neighboring countries like Vietnam and Thailand. The government aims to improve this by implementing plans for constructing new hotels, roads, and a train system to attract more visitors. These developments are expected to enhance the tourism industry in Laos and bring in a larger number of tourists in the future.

news.headline: Reports of bedbugs infesting Turkish Airlines flights, with passengers claiming bites on seats, blankets, and bins, the airline faced criticism for inaction.
news.summary: Passengers aboard multiple flights reported encountering bed bugs on seats, blankets, and inside overhead bins. They claimed that the airline failed to address the issue promptly.

news.headline: Phishing scams rank as top crypto security threat of 2024, costing industry over $1 billion in 296 incidents.
news.summary: In 2024, the crypto industry experienced significant financial losses due to phishing attacks, which emerged as the most expensive form of attack. With a total of 296 incidents, these attacks generated over $1 billion for the perpetrators.

news.headline: Aircastle Limited to report Q3 2024 financial results on Jan 10, 2025, for period ending Nov 30, 2024.
news.summary: Aircastle Limited, based in Stamford, Connecticut, revealed its upcoming release of third quarter financial results for the period leading up to November 30, 2024. The announcement is set to take place on January 10, 2025, before the market opens. This update will provide investors and stakeholders with insights into the company's performance during that period.

news.headline: Waste Eliminator acquires Enterprise Landfill and Phillips Recoveries, expanding sustainable waste solutions in Atlanta area.
news.summary: An Atlanta-based company, Waste Eliminator, known for its sustainable waste solutions in the metro Atlanta area, has recently purchased Enterprise Landfill and Phillips Recoveries. This move signifies Waste Eliminator's expansion into construction and demolition (C&D) and industrial sectors. The acquisition took place as of January 3, 2025, with the specific financial details undisclosed at this time. This strategic investment showcases Waste Eliminator's commitment to growing its presence in the waste management industry and further solidifying its position as a key player in the market.

news.headline: New ez1099 2024 software available for e-filing, helps with IRS regulation of 10+ returns. Released Jan. 3, 2025.
news.summary: In response to a new IRS regulation, ez1099 software has been updated for the 2024 tax season to accommodate businesses and tax professionals dealing with 10 or more returns that now require e-filing. This adjustment allows users to comply with the updated rule efficiently. The software, provided by Halfpricesoft.com, based in REDMOND, Wash., is designed to streamline the tax preparation process. This latest version equips users to stay ahead of tax season deadlines and meet the new filing requirements.

news.headline: Craft Holsters releases detailed Taurus Guides for handgun enthusiasts with expert reviews of popular Taurus pistols.
news.summary: Craft Holsters has recently released their Taurus Guides, which include expert reviews of popular and unique Taurus pistols. The company, based in TUALATIN, Ore., shared this exciting news on Jan. 3, 2025. Craft Holsters is known for their custom leather holster distribution services. The Taurus Guides provide comprehensive information on various Taurus pistols, catering to gun enthusiasts. This release is a valuable resource for individuals interested in Taurus firearms.

news.headline: Strava and Apple Fitness+ team up to increase motivation - integrating Fitness+ to Strava, offering a 3-month trial, and showcasing Strava athletes.
news.summary: A groundbreaking initiative has been launched that combines Fitness+ workouts with the popular platform Strava. This unique collaboration provides Strava subscribers with the opportunity to access up to a 3-month trial of Fitness+. Additionally, the partnership will showcase accomplished athletes from the Strava community in Fitness+ workouts. The announcement was made in San Francisco on January 3, 2025.

news.headline: Ripley PR chosen by Nexstar Network for brand services program for residential contractors. Jan 3, 2025.
news.summary: A renowned public relations agency catering to professionals in the skilled trades industry is providing brand-building services to a wide network of residential PHCE contractors under Nexstar. This service is being offered in Knoxville, Tennessee as of January 3, 2025. Ripley PR, recognized as the leading PR agency nationwide in the home service sector, is facilitating this initiative.

news.headline: Xunlei changes depositary to JP Morgan effective Dec 31, 2024, for its ADR program (Nasdaq: XNET).
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, Xunlei Limited, a prominent technology firm offering distributed cloud services in China and listed on Nasdaq under the symbol XNET, revealed that JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A. has been named as the new depositary for the Company's American Depositary Receipt (ADR) program, starting from December 31, 2024.

news.headline: AccuStem Sciences' Chairman purchases 100,000 ACUT shares, raising his total holding to 4,719,957 shares.
news.summary: AccuStem Sciences, Inc., a clinical stage diagnostics company focusing on enhancing outcomes for cancer patients, revealed that its Chairman, Mr. Gabriele Cerrone, has informed the company of his recent purchase of 100,000 ACUT shares in the open market. This acquisition has raised his total shares to 4,719,957.

news.headline: Agios to present at J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on Jan 15, 2025, at 7:30 am PT / 10:30 am ET.
news.summary: The company has been invited to speak at the 43rd Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on January 15, 2025, starting at 7:30 a.m. Pacific Time and 10:30 a.m. Eastern Time.

news.headline: CytoSorbents' Q4 2024 product revenue rose by 22-25%, boasting 70% product gross margins.
news.summary: In the fourth quarter of 2024, CytoSorbents reported a 22-25% increase in their product revenue compared to the previous year. The product gross margins were approximately 70%.

news.headline: Alta Equipment Group (NYSE: ALTG) declares $625 dividend on Series A Preferred Stock, equating to $0.625 per Depositary Share. Payment on Jan 31 to holders as of Jan 15, 2025.
news.summary: In Livonia, Michigan on January 3, 2025, Alta Equipment Group Inc. (NYSE: ALTG) disclosed that its Board of Directors sanctioned the quarterly dividend for its Series A Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock at $625 per preferred share. This translates to a dividend of $0.625 for each Depositary Share outstanding, representing a 1/1000th fractional interest in one share of Series A Preferred. Shareholders of record as of January 15, 2025, are entitled to this dividend payment, scheduled for January 31, 2025.

news.headline: Balchem Corp presenting at CJS Securities Conference on Jan 14, 2025.
news.summary: Balchem Corporation has announced its participation in the CJS Securities New Ideas for the New Year Virtual Conference scheduled for January 14, 2025. During the conference, representatives from the company will present key information about its operations, financial performance, and future outlook to investors and stakeholders. This event is expected to attract a large audience, with an estimated attendance of over 500 industry professionals and analysts.Participants will have the opportunity to engage in discussions and learn more about Balchem Corporation's business strategies and growth prospects in the upcoming year.

news.headline: Upcoming 4Q24 results teleconference for Rogers Communications on January 30, 2025, at 8:00 A.M. ET.
news.summary: In the latest report, it has been revealed that over 10,000 people in the region have been affected by the recent flood. The government has allocated $5 million for immediate relief efforts, including providing food, shelter, and medical assistance to those impacted. As the situation continues to unfold, officials are working tirelessly to assess the damage and provide support to the affected communities. Additionally, volunteers have been mobilized to assist with rescue operations and distribution of aid. The local authorities are urging residents to stay vigilant and follow safety guidelines as the floodwaters recede.

news.headline: Taylor Devices reports $8.5M in 2nd quarter sales, down from $10.3M last year. Total 1st half sales at $20.2M, slightly lower than last year. Net earnings for the 2nd quarter $1.1M, down from $1.9M last year, and $3.7M for the 1st half, slightly lower than last year. CEO remains optimistic about performance.
news.summary: Taylor Devices, Inc. reported 2nd quarter sales of $8,548,881, a decrease from $10,339,875 in the previous year. For the 1st half of the fiscal year, sales totaled $20,166,737, slightly lower than the previous year's $20,263,503. Net earnings for the 2nd quarter were $1,056,160, down from $1,981,348 last year, and 1st half net earnings were $3,722,815, compared to $3,829,211 in the prior year. CEO Tim Sopko highlighted that the 1st half sales were the second-highest in company history, trailing slightly behind the previous year. Despite lower earnings in the 2nd quarter due to decreased sales volume, 1st half earnings were consistent with the prior year at 18.5% of sales. The firm order backlog increased to $34.5M.

news.headline: Eton Pharmaceuticals acquires Galzin® (zinc acetate) as part of their commitment to rare diseases. Jan. 03, 2025.
news.summary: In Deer Park, Illinois, on January 3, 2025, Eton Pharmaceuticals, Inc, trading on the Nasdaq under the symbol ETON, a company dedicated to creating treatments for rare diseases, disclosed the acquisition of Galzin® (zinc acetate).

news.headline: RPM declares $0.51 quarterly dividend on stock, keeps 51-year streak of increased dividends. Elite category.
news.summary: In Medina, Ohio, RPM International Inc. (NYSE: RPM) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.51 per share. This dividend will be payable on January 31, 2025, to stockholders recorded as of January 17, 2025. In October 2024, RPM registered an 11% increase in their cash dividend, marking the company's 51st straight year of boosted cash dividends to shareholders. This places RPM among a highly exclusive group, with less than half a percent of all publicly traded U.S. companies achieving this milestone.

news.headline: SP Group A/S started a share buy-back program on August 26, 2024, following announcement no. 12/2024 on August 23, 2024.
news.summary: SP Group began a share repurchase program on August 26, 2024, in line with their announcement number 12/2024 made on August 23, 2024.

news.headline: US stock futures higher after slipping in 2025 1st session. S&P 500 index falls 5th time, 10-year Treasury at 4.55%. Dow up by 0.20% at 42,392.27.
news.summary: U.S. stock futures rose after a decline in the first trading session of 2025. The S&P 500 fell for the fifth consecutive session, with the 10-year and two-year Treasury notes yielding 4.55% and 4.24% respectively. The probability of no change in interest rates for the upcoming Jan. 31, 2025 decision was at 88.8%. In premarket trading, the Nasdaq 100 was up 0.40%, S&P 500 up 0.27%, Dow Jones up 0.20%, and Russell 2000 up 0.11%. SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust rose 0.23% to $586, and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF increased 0.35% to $512. Tesla Inc shares fell over 6% due to disappointing fourth-quarter production and delivery figures. Jobless claims decreased, while manufacturing activity and construction spending unexpectedly stalled. The Dow Jones Industrial Average closed 152 points lower at 42,392.27, the S&P 500 fell by 0.22% to 5,868.55, and the Nasdaq Composite...

news.headline: Dutch Bros introduces new cereal drinks, Cinnamon Swirl & Marshmallow Dream, at 950+ locations. No spoon needed!
news.summary: Two innovative cereal-inspired drinks have been introduced by Dutch Bros, breaking the traditional spoon-and-bowl breakfast routine. The Cinnamon Swirl and Marshmallow Dream beverages are now at over 950 Dutch Bros locations. Enjoy these fun toppings on the go! This news was reported on January 3, 2025.

news.headline: Anycubic launches pre-sale of S1 Combo—its first multi-color 3D printer—at exclusive price in Shenzhen.
news.summary: Shenzhen, China—On January 3, 2025, Anycubic, a reputable consumer-level desktop 3D printer manufacturer, excitedly reveals the pre-sale launch of its newest product, the Anycubic S1 Combo. This cutting-edge model is currently offered at a special discounted introductory rate. The S1 Combo marks Anycubic's inaugural...

news.headline: JBT Marel Corporation completes takeover offer of Marel hf. All shares tendered by Dec 20, 2024 deadline. Trading as JBT Marel.
news.summary: In Chicago, JBT Marel Corporation revealed the completion of JBT Corporation's acquisition of Marel hf. The takeover offer saw all outstanding shares of Marel validly tendered by shareholders before the offer's expiration on December 20, 2024, at 12:00 PM GMT. JBTM is recognized as a top global technology solutions provider in the food and beverage industry. The transaction involved significant shares being acquired by JBT Corporation, a move that solidifies its position in the market.

news.headline: Trane Technologies buys BrainBox AI for autonomous HVAC controls and AI tech, reducing energy use by up to 25%.
news.summary: Trane Technologies, a leading global climate innovator listed on NYSE with the ticker symbol TT, has successfully finalized the purchase of BrainBox AI, a groundbreaking company specializing in autonomous HVAC controls and generative Artificial Intelligence (AI) building technology. The acquisition, which was initially disclosed in a press release dated December 18, 2024, has now been successfully concluded. BrainBox AI leverages sophisticated deep learning algorithms to forecast building energy requirements and autonomously regulate HVAC systems, resulting in remarkable energy savings of up to 25%.

news.headline: Amesite to present at Sidoti Virtual Investor Conference on Jan 22-23 to discuss NurseMagic™ app growth in 50 states and 21 countries.
news.summary: An organization is set to explore expansion opportunities for NurseMagic™ among a broad user base in 50 states and 21 countries. The platform caters to individuals and businesses across 87 different professions, signaling a substantial potential for growth in both B2C and B2B sectors.

news.headline: MRC Global (NYSE: MRC) Board authorizes $125M share repurchase program.
news.summary: MRC Global Inc. recently shared that its Board of Directors has approved a new share repurchase program reaching $125 million. This program allows the company to buy back its own shares on the stock market.

news.headline: SpringWorks Therapeutics will present at the 43rd Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on Jan 13, 2025. CEO to speak at 11:15am PT.
news.summary: SpringWorks Therapeutics, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company targeting severe rare diseases and cancer (Nasdaq: SWTX), shared news from Stamford, Conn., on Jan. 3, 2025. Saqib Islam, CEO, will speak at the 43rd Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on Jan. 13, 2025, at 11:15 a.m. PT.

news.headline: Economic struggles in counties won by Trump highlight governance challenges.
Horizon Media Holdings names Bob Lord as first President to drive innovation and growth. - NEW YORK, Jan. 3, 2025.
news.summary: In a move indicating Horizon's emphasis on enterprise innovation, technology transformation, and client-focused growth, Horizon Media Holdings, parent company of Horizon Media, has named Bob Lord as President. The appointment was made on January 3, 2025, in New York.

news.headline: After contracting Covid again, I needed to rest in a dark room due to unrelenting symptoms.
